title: Stabilize Rust coverage + badge
description: Fix and document Rust coverage workflow (cargo llvm-cov, asset build, badge generation). Ensure README badge updates reliably. No commits during deployment window.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Progress: documented Rust coverage workflow in docs/RUST_COVERAGE.md; updated AGENTS.md coverage guidance to cargo llvm-cov; adjusted tools/run_specs.py to sync console assets and fix help text; updated tools/run_amplify_ci.sh to use cargo llvm-cov and build/sync console assets; updated .github/workflows/ci.yml to publish a failed rust-coverage badge when rust job fails. No commits made.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Ran local Rust coverage via cargo llvm-cov with embedded assets sync. Result: 80.0% line coverage (coverage-rust/cobertura.xml). Badge cannot update without CI or a badges-branch commit.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented missing Rust step definitions to reduce skipped specs: added stdout parent-reference check, Given comment steps to add comments with/without IDs, and Given step to add dependencies to existing issues.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented missing BDD steps: added Rust console UI steps for no-tab selection, detail panel issue, console route handling, and priority label checks; added Rust output step for combined stdout+stderr; implemented Python default priority assertion mapping priority id to name. Tests not run.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Removed redundant Python run-command steps and expanded generic regex handling; aligned Rust steps with regex patterns, added Interop create steps, native deletable create step, setup-agents non-interactive step, and beads issues.jsonl assertions; added Rust config steps for KANBUS_PROJECT_KEY unset and specific hierarchy/project key strings. check_spec_parity now clean (with DeprecationWarning about escape sequences). Tests not run.
